rules.name: BP_AutoFill_Address
rules.description: When changing business partner, auto-fill delivery address and price list

rules.name: Line_Recalc_Totals
rules.description: After saving a line, recalculate header totals (TotalLines, GrandTotal)

rules.name: Product_AutoFill_Price
rules.description: When selecting a product, auto-fill unit price, tax and UOM from price list

rules.name: Line_Calc_NetAmount
rules.description: Recalculate line net amount when quantity, price or discount changes

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when quotation status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: ValidUntil_Default
rules.description: Default validUntil to orderDate + 30 days when creating a new quotation

rules.name: Convert_To_Order
rules.description: Process to convert an approved quotation into a Sales Order (copies header + lines, sets new doc type)

rules.name: Delivery_Fields_Hidden
rules.description: Delivery-related fields (isDelivered, deliveryLocation, warehouse on header) are not relevant for quotations and are omitted from the schema
